label: BGE Small EN v1.5
query_prefix: Represent this sentence for searching relevant passages:
notes: Direct MiniLM replacement candidate with the same vector dimensions.

label: BGE Base EN v1.5
query_prefix: Represent this sentence for searching relevant passages:
notes: Larger BGE candidate for quality/cost comparison.

label: Nomic Embed Text v1.5
notes: Long-context candidate. Reduced Matryoshka dimensions require a later projection/cropping implementation.

label: Jina Embeddings v2 Small EN
notes: Long-context small English candidate. Disabled for current Rust bakeoff: no default onnx/model.onnx is available from the Hugging Face repo.

label: Jina Embeddings v3
notes: Long-context multitask candidate; may require provider-specific task handling. Disabled for current Rust bakeoff: Transformers.js expects external ONNX data files; current Rust loader only validates onnx/model.onnx layout.

label: Qwen3 Embedding 0.6B
notes: Heavier quality-ceiling candidate; likely to expose packaging/runtime cost. Disabled for current Rust bakeoff: no default onnx/model.onnx is available from the Hugging Face repo.

label: EmbeddingGemma 300M
notes: On-device candidate with task prefixes; ONNX/cache availability must be verified. Disabled for current Rust bakeoff: model repo is gated/unauthorized without Hugging Face auth.

label: E5 Small v2
notes: Classic compact retrieval baseline with explicit passage/query prefixes. Disabled for current Rust bakeoff: no default onnx/model.onnx is available from the Hugging Face repo.

label: All MPNet Base v2
notes: Older strong sentence-transformers baseline for cost/quality comparison.
